title: Integrated Information Security Analysis Team Handoffs

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=itsm sourcetype=snow:incident category="Security" earliest=-30d
| transaction number maxspan=24h startswith="assignment_group=SOC" endswith="assignment_group=CTI"
| where duration>3600
| table number, duration, assignment_group, short_description
value: Tracks cross-team comments and assignments between SOC and CTI for IR-10 integrated infosec analysis team collaboration.
implementation: (1) Validate `transaction` performance — limit indexes; (2) alternatively use `streamstats` on sorted events; (3) KPI for handoff latency; (4) monthly leadership review.
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
